api_log.error: API returned REQUEST_SUCCEEDED but no annual (period=A01) data found for the requested OEWS series IDs. Series ID format may need updating.

api_attempt.note: api_reachable=True means HTTP connection succeeded. api_data_returned=True means wage values were extracted from the response. If reachable but no data, the OEWS series ID format may need updating.

static_fallback.reason: BLS API unavailable or returned non-success

static_fallback.citation: Bureau of Labor Statistics, Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics, May 2023. https://www.bls.gov/oes/tables.htm

ecec_parameters.source: BLS ECEC Q4 2024 (https://www.bls.gov/ect/): Government worker wages are approximately 72.2% of total compensation (implies benefit multiplier = 1/0.722 = 1.385). Additional overhead factor 1.05× applied for training, equipment, and facilities. Combined fully loaded factor = 1.385 × 1.05 = 1.4543. Note: ECEC parameters are static constants derived from published ECEC tables, not fetched via API. ECEC API does not provide a machine-readable series for the government benefit cost share.
